Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class AccountRequestUpdate

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components.AccountRequestUpdate
public class AccountRequestUpdate extends Object
AccountRequestUpdate

A single record representing an owner or manager of an Account.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Optional<Boolean>
    acceptsIssuerDirectCommunication()
    Indicates if the issuer of a security held by the account is permitted to communicate directly with the shareholder versus through the brokerage firm; This can include sending proxy statements, annual reports, and other important information directly to the shareholder's address on file with the brokerage firm By default, this is set to `false`.
    Optional<Boolean>
    advised()
    A boolean to indicate if an account is advised
    static AccountRequestUpdate.Builder
    builder()
     
    Optional<AccountRequestUpdateCatAccountHolderType>
    catAccountHolderType()
    The FINRA CAT classification for the Account Holder; Is set automatically based on attributes of the owners and account type
    boolean

    A list of identifiers associated with the account

    withAcceptsIssuerDirectCommunication(boolean acceptsIssuerDirectCommunication)
    Indicates if the issuer of a security held by the account is permitted to communicate directly with the shareholder versus through the brokerage firm; This can include sending proxy statements, annual reports, and other important information directly to the shareholder's address on file with the brokerage firm By default, this is set to `false`.

  • Method Details

    • acceptsIssuerDirectCommunication

      public Optional<Boolean> acceptsIssuerDirectCommunication()
      Indicates if the issuer of a security held by the account is permitted to communicate directly with the shareholder versus through the brokerage firm; This can include sending proxy statements, annual reports, and other important information directly to the shareholder's address on file with the brokerage firm By default, this is set to `false`.

    • advised

      public Optional<Boolean> advised()
      A boolean to indicate if an account is advised

    • catAccountHolderType

      public Optional<AccountRequestUpdateCatAccountHolderType> catAccountHolderType()
      The FINRA CAT classification for the Account Holder; Is set automatically based on attributes of the owners and account type

    • identifiers

      public Optional<List<IdentifierUpdate>> identifiers()
      A list of identifiers associated with the account

    • interestedParties

      public Optional<List<InterestedPartyUpdate>> interestedParties()
      A list of natural persons indicated to receive selected account documents such as account statements

    • investmentProfile

      public Optional<InvestmentProfileUpdate> investmentProfile()
      Investor profile.

    • managed

      public Optional<Boolean> managed()
      A boolean to indicate if an account is managed

    • parties

      public Optional<List<PartyRequestUpdate>> parties()
      Parties associated with the account (e.g. custodian).

    • primaryRegisteredRepId

      public Optional<String> primaryRegisteredRepId()
      The primary registered representative for the account

    • taxProfile

      public Optional<AccountTaxProfileUpdate> taxProfile()
      The account tax profile.

    • trustedContacts

      public Optional<List<TrustedContactUpdate>> trustedContacts()
      A list of persons designated to verify the well being of the account holder.

    • wrapFeeBilled

      public Optional<Boolean> wrapFeeBilled()
      A boolean to indicate if an account is a wrap brokerage account

    • withAcceptsIssuerDirectCommunication

      public AccountRequestUpdate withAcceptsIssuerDirectCommunication(boolean acceptsIssuerDirectCommunication)
      Indicates if the issuer of a security held by the account is permitted to communicate directly with the shareholder versus through the brokerage firm; This can include sending proxy statements, annual reports, and other important information directly to the shareholder's address on file with the brokerage firm By default, this is set to `false`.

    • withAcceptsIssuerDirectCommunication

      public AccountRequestUpdate withAcceptsIssuerDirectCommunication(Optional<Boolean> acceptsIssuerDirectCommunication)
      Indicates if the issuer of a security held by the account is permitted to communicate directly with the shareholder versus through the brokerage firm; This can include sending proxy statements, annual reports, and other important information directly to the shareholder's address on file with the brokerage firm By default, this is set to `false`.
